description_long: This is a vintage-style arcade machine with a boxy, upright structure and a slightly angled front panel. The exterior is painted in a camouflage green with black, irregular patches, and features silhouettes of a soldier and rifles on the sides and back, as well as black flame motifs near the base. The front panel houses a large CRT-style screen displaying static and the text 'VHS PAUSE II', with a control panel below that includes two joysticks and several buttons. The machine's overall appearance is rugged and military-themed, with a utilitarian, matte finish. The kiosk is constructed primarily from wood or MDF, with plastic and metal components for the controls and screen. Its design is reminiscent of classic arcade cabinets found in urban entertainment venues.
description: A military-themed arcade machine with camouflage paint, black silhouettes, and a CRT screen displaying 'VHS PAUSE II'. Features include joysticks, buttons, and a rugged, boxy build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the CRT screen with 'VHS PAUSE II', control panel with joysticks and buttons, and camouflage paint.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a black rifle silhouette, flame motifs at the base, and the angled profile of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large black silhouette of a soldier against the camouflage background.
description_view_3: Right side view with another black rifle silhouette, flame motifs, and the side profile of the control panel.
attribute_signage_type: digital display integrated into structure, front panel, text: 'VHS PAUSE II', black rifle and soldier silhouettes as graphic signage on sides and back
attribute_roof_design: flat, boxy top with no overhangs or decorative elements, matching camouflage paint
attribute_architectural_style: retro utilitarian with military-themed graphic elements
